limitations.title: Wrapper sink promotion is improved but remains conservative for complex helper topologies
limitations.workaround: Use project-local custom sink specs or custom rules for dynamic/cross-module helper chains and validate with focused fixtures.

limitations.title: Framework receiver and type disambiguation remains incomplete
limitations.workaround: Use triage and verification artifacts to confirm exploitability; add framework-specific custom rules for local idioms.

limitations.title: Non-host LLM redaction and token budgeting remain heuristic
limitations.workaround: Use deterministic mode for strict data-boundary requirements outside the host workflow. Host LLM analysis applies dedicated structured redaction before provider calls, but all LLM outputs should still be reviewed before action.

limitations.title: Verification coverage depends on target preconditions and template fit
limitations.workaround: Provide explicit verify metadata/profiles and review precondition diagnostics in verify.json before treating a finding as not exploitable.

limitations.title: Advisory matching quality depends on local advisory DB freshness
limitations.workaround: Run advisory update/import workflows before scans and monitor advisory DB freshness warnings in reports.
